name: Dagger
description: A concealed blade for emergencies, rituals, and close-range defense.

name: Arcane Focus
description: A personal magical implement used to channel spellcasting without reaching for material components.

name: Component Pouch
description: A backup store of spell components and small ritual tools.

name: Explorer's Pack
description: Rations, rope, torches, and practical travel supplies for long stretches away from safety.

name: Magical Silver Ring
description:
Last Invitation: 
Once per turn, when a humanoid fails a save against one of your spells, you can impose Charmed or Frightened until the end of your next turn; each use requires a DC 12 Wisdom save, and on a failure you have disadvantage on your next attack roll or spell save DC. 
Second Face: Once per long rest, regain sorcery points equal to half your level (rounded down); you have disadvantage on Insight checks.
